# gcore_cloud_inference_secret (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "gcore_cloud_inference_secret" "example_cloud_inference_secret" {
  project_id = 1
  secret_name = "aws-dev"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `secret_name` (String) Inference secret name.

### Optional

- `project_id` (Number) Project ID

### Read-Only

- `data` (Attributes) Secret data. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--data))
- `name` (String) Secret name.
- `type` (String) Secret type.

<a id="nestedatt--data"></a>
### Nested Schema for `data`

Read-Only:

- `aws_access_key_id` (String) AWS IAM key ID.
- `aws_secret_access_key` (String) AWS IAM secret key.
